title: あの日、夢を見せてくれたから

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The day is finally here! The only question is, which Umamusume will
take the crown and give us a new dream for the future?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby... It's a very special race for Umamusume,
trainers, and fans alike.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The 2,400-meter turf track is one of the major races of the Twinkle
Series Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They say becoming a Derby champion trainer is even harder than
becoming prime minister.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Prime minister? I don't think I know what that is! But they must be
pretty amazing, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And the Derby's even harder than becoming a super awesome person
like that, huh. That's exactly why...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who wins it will inspire hopes and dreams in alllll the
people watching her!
choice_data_list: Ticket, I didn't know you were here!
Ticket, I didn't know you were here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Course I'm here! It's the Japanese Derby we're talking about! A must-see!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But, hey! I never thought I'd see you here, ant-fan! Sooo glad I did
though!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: This is it! The dream race for both fans and racers...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Begins now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All racers have rounded the fourth corner! They're on the fated final
stretch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wahaaagh! Go, go, go! Go for it, everybodyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Look at number five! What an amazing last push! Ah, but number
eleven's making a late charge too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa, there's the favorite, but she's coming in from far outside! Is
she going for it? For real?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: THAT'S THE FINIIISH! The top Umamusume has been decided!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: She did iiit! Amazing... Everyone tried... so hard...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaagh! I'm melting wiv emoshooooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a little time for Winning Ticket to stop crying from all the
excitement. Actually... it takes a really long time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... What an amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The Derby really is the best! Uuugh! I can't wait to race in iiit!
choice_data_list: You feel pretty strongly about the Derby, huh?
You feel pretty strongly about the Derby, huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You bet I do!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I got to do so many sports when I was a kid, but watching a race for
the first time was really special for me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was only watching on TV, but even so! The energy of the crowd was
sooo amazing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I could tell the crowd got all charged up from watching the racers
giving it their all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It was so... so... incredible! I just... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Pwagh! I'm fine! Heheheh, thinking about it suddenly got me all
choked up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's the gist, though. The race track was always where I wanted to
be...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And then one day, I went to see it with my family! The Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The heat! The passion! Even as a little kid, clueless about racing—I
could feel it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I knew it was a totally special, one-of-a-kind place!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And then! All the fans around me told me, "The Derby is a place filled
with dreams!"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: "And the Derby champion makes all those dreams come true!"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's why I've got to win the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just like the racers I saw on TV back then! Like the racers I saw from
the stands that day! Like everyone who ran so hard here today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'll do it too! I'll be the one who inspires dreams in
everyone's hearts! The Derby champiooon!
choice_data_list: That's an admirable goal to have.
That's an admirable goal to have.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?! You think it's a-a-ambirable?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh, really? Hehehe... Eheheh! Whoa, I'm all jittery and blushing.
Almost itchy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But thanks! I'm gonna work hard for my dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, before that, I need to find a trainer to work with. So I can make...
my...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Debuuuuut?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: W-w-wait! Ant-fan! That... that badge on your collar! Could you be...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A TRAINER?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yep! Just now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So, I'm begging you! Please be my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Please. please, please! I've got to become a Derby champion! I just
have to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on our interactions thus far, her earnestness is painfully clear to
me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And a true trainer would never refuse someone so honest and
devoted!
choice_data_list: All right! Let's go for the Derby together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Reallyyy?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaa-HOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I really mean it! Thank you... Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you sooo muuuch! Waaaaah!
